subcodes.first_line: O loving Lord! These two blessed souls were luminous candles and rendered service to the world of humanity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خداوند مهربانا این دو نفس مبارک دو شمع روشن بودند و خدمت بعالم انسانی نمودند
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @prayer for the departed, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @nearness to God
